headline: Is It Time To Reassess Fortive (FTV) After Recent Share Price Strength
summary: Investors may be wondering if Fortive is actually good value at around US$61.28 a share, or if the price already reflects the story they are paying for. The stock has recently posted returns of 4.4% over 7 days, 1.4% over 30 days, 10.6% year to date and 11.5% over 1 year. This performance has put valuation questions back on the radar for many investors. Recent coverage has focused on Fortive as a steady industrial player with exposure to essential measurement and automation equipment. This...
